IDR: Group = WT_norm_vs_S (IDR-SOX2 vs SOX2) or Charge_norm_vs_C (Charge-IDR-SOX2 vs Charge-SOX2).
log2_FR = Log2(Firefly Luciferase/ Renilla Luciferase) for this well.
Baseline_SOX2_median_log2FR = Plate median of log2_FR for SOX2 (S_med), same value for all rows.
Baseline_ChargeSOX2_median_log2FR = Plate median of log2_FR for Charge-SOX2 (C_med), same value for all rows.
y_norm_log2 = If WT_norm_vs_S: log2_FR − S_med; if Charge_norm_vs_C: log2_FR − C_med.
Fold = 2^(y_norm_log2); fold change vs its own baseline (SOX2 or Charge-SOX2).
Fold_WTnormalized = Fold divided by the WT group geometric mean for the same IDR (so WT center ≈ 1).
